---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[Download CV (PDF)](assets/cv.pdf)

::: {.callout-note}
**Placeholder.** Drop your current CV PDF into `assets/cv.pdf` (overwriting the placeholder) and the link above will serve it. If you'd like the CV rendered as on-page HTML — which is what makes it Google-indexable — paste the contents into this file and I'll format it.
:::
